title: Adaptive AI Productivity Assistant for Developers in VS Code
description: An AI-powered developer productivity assistant built as a VS Code extension. The project focuses on improving developer workflow through intelligent task tracking, productivity analysis, and context-aware support inside the coding environment.
myContribution: My main contribution is the Intelligent TODO Tracker, which detects TODO-related tasks from source code and developer notes, enriches them using heuristic and ML-based methods, links tasks with related files, prioritizes tasks, and stores TODOs in a workspace-scoped structure.
features: Hybrid heuristic and ML-based TODO detection
Project-based storage using .vscode with fallback storage
Backend and PythonBridge support for ML inference
